message:
test(iconv_abi): add strict/hardened mode conformance tests (bd-z7gt)

Add 8 tests covering FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict and FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened
behavior for iconv operations:

- strict_mode_iconv_open_unsupported_returns_error
- strict_mode_iconv_open_null_returns_error
- strict_mode_iconv_utf8_to_utf16le_succeeds
- hardened_mode_iconv_open_unsupported_returns_error
- hardened_mode_iconv_open_null_returns_error
- hardened_mode_iconv_utf8_to_utf16le_succeeds
- strict_mode_iconv_invalid_utf8_reports_eilseq
- hardened_mode_iconv_invalid_utf8_reports_eilseq

Part of iconv conformance+reproducibility gates closure.

br-bd-z7gt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
